scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.test: npm test --prefix client && npm test --prefix server
scripts.audit: npm audit --prefix client --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --prefix server --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit
